texts.label: text
texts.orig: Come and celebrate the long weekend with us and enjoy our special packages Maiyan Luxury Resort in Nanyuki is offering special October holiday packages for a weekend escape.
texts.text: Come and celebrate the long weekend with us and enjoy our special packages Maiyan Luxury Resort in Nanyuki is offering special October holiday packages for a weekend escape.

texts.orig: o Unlimited access to resort activities: horse riding, mini-golf, catch & release fishing, jungle biking, a heated rooftop plunge pool/jacuzzi, an inhouse nature trail, a farm tour, and bird feeding.
